message:
feat(prime): add compact/resume detection for lighter post-compaction prime

When gt prime --hook runs after compaction or resume (source="compact" or
"resume"), outputs a compact recovery message instead of the full 594-line
role context. The agent already has role docs in compressed memory — just
needs identity confirmation, hook/work status, and any new mail.

594 lines → 19 lines for compact/resume. No hook config changes needed —
the existing SessionStart catch-all hook handles all source types.

Closes: gt-5encdn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
